items.title:
[正面] Edit: 10.07.25 
Every in-game problem has been fix...
items.summary:
Edit: 10.07.25 
Every in-game problem has been fixed, I did not check if the Log-In box appears correctly now but all Videos and Animations now load flawlessly!
I'll leave my original review down below.


Very fun game with fun mechanics and good lore after struggling for a few minutes to get past the semi-invisible log in screen (Linux only problem), only bad thing I found about it in the 3hrs are a few Linux related bugs like Backgrounds and Animations not loading at all or incorrectly

items.title: [负面] I initially liked the game but the roguelite aspec...
items.summary:
I initially liked the game but the roguelite aspect just disappeared after a while. Now I don't recommend it. There is only one thing that matters and it's how much you invested in your team. Even for the story, you need a meta team fully invested and it's really long to do that. I am tired of having to play the same team for the story. I just want to enjoy the story with a team I have fun with and have the challenge in the endgame content or even the hard mode for the story.

The honeymoon phase is over and this game is really predatory. They release incomplete characters usable only after 3 duplicates, and the game expects high investment for every team. Imagine pulling a character and then needing 3 months to start playing it. You think giving one free dupe is F2P friendly? It's just a bait. All DPS need 3 dupes and overleveling that is time-gated. This is the MORIMENS experience.

This game is not that roguelite and strategic. It's good until chapter 6–7, but after it's all about investment and meta teams just to complete the story. I did everything deathless until chapter 9 because I played a meta team I invested in, but now that I need 4 more teams like that, I just gave up. I know gacha is about long-term, but there is a difference between waiting 3 months to become stronger over time and being stuck with a useless character for 3 months because you don't have duplicates or even a year because you don't have their support.

It's still possible to have fun for free for the first chapters, but I don't recommend spending money on this game. It's a cash grab and the Japanese version is already suffering from that. I don't have the patience and the time to do the dailies. Dailies are really long in this game and hours are needed instead of 5–20 minutes like other gachas. You have one daily fight + one event fight + 1 endgame fight (5 a week that need an invested team for EACH, so FIVE TEAMS, in a dupes-heavy game!). And it's just the team but you also need to invest in weapons...
Even in Nikke it's more accessible because you don't have to level up again or have dupes. I really regret spending money on this game.
